name: Volcanic Bloom (Stage 2)
description: The mid-stage fusion of volcanic magma and solar flora. It synthesizes geothermal magma with photosynthetic light to blossom with intense incinerating energy.
originLore: Born at the boundary where magma rivers meet cosmic nebulae, Volcanic Bloom fuses the destructive force of molten rock with the regenerative grace of solar flora.

lore.celestialConcordance: Volcanic Bloom channels geothermal pressure into verdant cosmic flora, converting molten slag into fertile star matter.

quantumResonators.name: Magma Eruption
quantumResonators.description: Launches molten seed pods that burst into self-sustaining geothermal fires.

quantumResonators.name: Solar Photosynthesis
quantumResonators.description: Absorbs cosmic radiation to instantaneously heal structural fissures.
